name: Braciole
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Round Steak, cut 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the beef.
2. Cut into as many evenly sized pieces as there are servings desired.
3. Place each between 2 sheets of waxed paper.
4. Pound each piece as thin as possible (the thinner the steaks, the better the dish).
5. Brown the sausage lightly in a skillet.
6. Add the parsley, first measure of oregano, garlic, onion, and first measure of salt to the skillet.
7. Mix thoroughly.
8. Spread 2 to 3 tablespoons of the mixture on each flattened steak.
9. Roll each steak jelly-roll fashion.
10. Secure the steaks with string or toothpicks or both.
11. Place the rolled steaks in the bottom of the slow cooker.
12. Combine the tomatoes, tomato paste, second measure of salt, and second measure of oregano.
13. Pour over the steak rolls.
14. Cover and cook on the slow cooker's LOW setting for 8 to 10 hours.
15. Serve the steak rolls with the sauce.
